resume_instructions:
83 TOTAL DECISIONS. 18 TENETS. ALL DISCOVERY COMPLETE (Batches 1-7 + Phase 1b).

BATCH 6 COMPLETE (D56-D67): Sequential execution sequence LOCKED.

KEY BATCH 6 EVOLUTION:
  - Started with wave-based parallel approach (D56-D62)
  - Deep research: 13 agents mapped all 18 ecosystems at file-level dependency maps
  - User challenged fundamental assumptions: parallel tracks sacrifice learning for speed
  - D62 SUPERSEDED by D63: Sequential-first with research overlap
  - D64: T18 changelog-driven traceability added as new tenet (user directive)
  - D65: Docs elevated to position #5 (user directive)
  - D66: CI/CD restored at position #10 (was accidentally dropped)
  - D67: Final 21-step sequence locked

FINAL SEQUENCE (21 steps, 18 ecosystems):
  #1 CANON (L0->L5, L) — Foundation
  #2 Skills (L1->L3, L) — Daily tool, skill-audit canonized
  #3 Hooks (L3->L4, M) — Enforcement infra
  #4 PR Review (L4->L5, S) — CANON pilot, CHECKPOINT
  #5 Docs (L2->L3, M) — Folder structure, placement standards, dependency maps
  #6 Testing (L3->L4, M) — Test infrastructure
  #7 Sessions (L1->L3, M) — State management
  #8 TDMS L2->L3 (XL-partial) — First stage, Zod schemas + monitoring
  #9 Scripts (L2->L3, L) — Script standards, informed by TDMS
  #10 CI/CD (L1->L3, M) — Build/deploy pipelines
  #11 Alerts (L2->L4, M) — Monitoring layer
  #12 Analytics (L1->L3, M) — Aggregation layer
  #13 Agents (L2->L3, M) — Agent definitions
  #14 Audits (L3->L4+L5path, M) — All audits are skills
  #15 Archival/Rotation (L3->L4, M) — Lifecycle patterns
  #16 TDMS L3->L4 (XL-partial) — Second stage, enforcement
  #17 Roadmap & Execution (L2->L3, L) — Hub ecosystem, automated intake
  #18 Frontend/App (L2->L3, M) — App-layer connections
  #19 Firebase/Backend (L1->L3, M-L) — App-layer connections
  #20 Docs verification pass (S) — Consistency meta-check
  #21 TDMS L4->L5 (XL-final) — Final canonization

CHECKPOINTS: After #4 (framework validation), #7 (core infra complete), #15 (process layer complete), #21 (full overhaul complete).

EXECUTION MODEL: Sequential implementation + parallel research overlap (research N+1 while implementing N). No parallel implementation tracks.

DISCOVERY_RECORD needs update with D55-D67 + T18.

BATCH 7 COMPLETE (D68-D76): Edge cases resolved.
  D68: Skip & Return on stalls (changelog documents gaps)
  D69: Checklist addressed + user review as exit criteria
  D70: Track-CANON in ROADMAP + dedupe on add
  D71: Interleaved work + 3-session nudge
  D72: Extensible-core changelog schema (mirrors D22)
  D73: Grand Plan reassessment at #8 + pre-checks #1-#7 (explicit task)
  D74: Contracts defined per-ecosystem, CANON defines format
  D75: Knowledge base from all prior research for every Phase 0
  D76: Learning capture DURING builds (non-negotiable) + checkpoint versioning

PHASE 1b COMPLETE (D77-D83): Back-of-house process + audit framework.
  D77: Decomposed JSONL suite (decisions/tenets/directives/ideas/changelog.jsonl + coordination.json)
  D78: Git + tagged checkpoints + MCP memory for safety
  D79: JSONL source + scripted MD generation (generate-discovery-record.js)
  D80: Always full suite for all ecosystem deep-plans (no lightweight tier)
  D81: 16-domain audit framework across 3 tiers (core + analytical + ecosystem-reusable)
  D82: Interactive audit process (T15)
  D83: Audit twice — after DECISIONS.md and after PLAN.md

NEXT: Phase 2 (DECISIONS.md compilation + Audit 1: domains 1-3, 6, 8). Then Phase 3 (PLAN.md + Audit 2). Then Phase 4 (approval). Then Handoff.

DISCOVERY_RECORD needs full regeneration with D1-D83 + T1-T18. Ideally via the new generate-discovery-record.js script (D79).

NOTE: D77 calls for decomposing state.json into JSONL suite. This migration should happen BEFORE Phase 2 so DECISIONS.md is generated from the new JSONL source, not manually compiled from the old state.json.
migration_note: Decomposed from .claude/state/deep-plan.state.json per D77. JSONL files are now the canonical source. deep-plan.state.json is retained as backup but no longer the primary source of truth.
